header.title: Platform command center for revenue and tenant health.
header.description: This dashboard stays at platform level: subscription performance, organization status, and supervisor-safe signals.

0.label: Platform MRR

items.0: No supervisor has visibility into contract, simulator, room, catalog, or affiliate records.

items.2: Tenant activation velocity remains ahead of plan for the quarter.

hero.validatedQuote: Every quote validated before it goes out

platform.title: Pricify helps hotels centralize contracting, pricing, and quoting.
platform.subtitle: The product story is simple for customers: manage every hotel, every contract rule, every B2B partner, and every quote from one connected commercial workspace.

0.title: Multi-property control
0.copy: Directors can oversee hotels, teams, and commercial structure from a single operational workspace.

1.title: Deep contract engine
1.copy: Contracting teams manage a full B2B pricing engine spanning rate grids, SPOs, supplements, reductions, early booking, and cancellation rules.

2.title: Instant quote accuracy
2.copy: Front-desk agents can simulate contract-aware totals before releasing a quote, reducing risk, delays, and rework.

features.title: Everything the platform does is reflected in the first story your buyers see.
features.subtitle: From hotel setup to partner contracts and instant simulation, every section below translates the product into customer-facing operational value.

0.title: Multi-property control
0.description: Manage multiple hotels from one centralized workspace, with clear portfolio visibility, shared operational structure, and cleaner control over daily contracting activity.

bullets.1: One operating workspace for every property
bullets.2: Cleaner control across your commercial organization

1.title: Contract and SpO engine
1.description: Build, activate, and maintain partner agreements with structured periods, rate grids, supplements, reductions, early booking logic, special offers, and cancellation rules.

bullets.2: Lifecycle control from draft to active

2.title: Zero-risk price simulator
2.description: Let agents validate final selling prices against the active contract, booking date, arrangement, rooming list, promotions, and stay modifiers before sharing a quote.

3.title: Partner and affiliate management
3.description: Keep tour operators, agencies, and B2B travel partners connected to the right commercial conditions, contracts, and communication records in one place.

4.title: Director oversight and access control
4.description: Give directors a high-level view of hotels, teams, and permissions while keeping every user focused on the work that matches their responsibility.

bullets.2: Cleaner coordination across directors and operators

5.title: Hotel and catalog foundation
5.description: Model hotels, rooms, arrangements, affiliates, and pricing catalogs in one connected flow that feeds every contract and simulator decision.

roles.title: Every hotel team gets the workspace they actually need.
roles.subtitle: Directors, contracting teams, and front-desk staff all work differently. Pricify keeps each role fast, clear, and aligned around the same commercial truth.

0.title: Directors
0.subtitle: See the big picture across every hotel you manage.

points.0: Get a global overview of your hotel portfolio, operational structure, and team organization from one centralized workspace.
points.1: Control users, permissions, and hotel access without slowing down contracting and sales activity.
points.2: Keep multi-hotel performance and collaboration aligned as your commercial footprint grows.

1.title: Contracting Teams
1.subtitle: Set up complex B2B pricing without friction.

points.0: Manage hotels, room catalogs, arrangements, affiliates, and contract pricing conditions together in one flow.
points.1: Configure rate grids, SPOs, supplements, reductions, early booking rules, and cancellation logic with confidence.
points.2: Move from partner setup to contract publication without patching spreadsheets, emails, and disconnected files together.

points.0: Use the simulator as a focused pricing desk that respects active contracts, dates, rooming, and booking logic.
points.1: Generate instant quotes with validated totals before sharing a price with a customer or partner.
points.2: Work faster with a clean, focused interface built for accurate pricing rather than setup complexity.

security.title: Control grows with your hotel group, not against it.
security.subtitle: As your team, portfolio, and partner network expand, Pricify keeps access, visibility, and pricing logic organized so operations stay consistent across every hotel.

0.title: Access control
0.copy: Give each team member the right workspace so directors, contracting users, and front-desk staff stay focused.

1.title: Multi-property visibility
1.copy: Manage several hotels with a clearer operational structure and a centralized view of your commercial environment.

2.title: Reliable pricing execution
2.copy: Keep contracts, partner terms, and simulated prices aligned so every quote reflects the rules you actually negotiated.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade your hotel contracting?
cta.subtitle: Replace spreadsheet-heavy contracting, pricing errors, and fragmented partner coordination with one commercial workspace built for fast-moving hospitality teams.

footer.subtitle: Pricify connects multi-property control, hotel contracting, partner management, and zero-risk price validation in one modern hospitality workspace.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Pricify. Hotel contracting, partner pricing, and instant quote control.
